changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Create TB Laboratory organization for sample type validation

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Sputum' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'sputum'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Sputum' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'bal'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'BAL' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'bal'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'BAL' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Pleural Fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'pleural fluid'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Pleural Fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'csf'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'CSF' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'csf'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'CSF' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Tissue' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'tissue'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Tissue' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Gastric Aspirate' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'gastric aspirate'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Gastric Aspirate' AND description = 'sampleType name')

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'sputum'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type ost JOIN clinlims.organization o ON ost.org_id = o.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON ost.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'sputum'

changeSet.comment: Link Sputum sample type to TB Laboratory organization
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_sample_type (id, org_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.organization_sample_type_seq'), o.id, tos.id, 'Y', 1, now() FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'sputum';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'bal'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type ost JOIN clinlims.organization o ON ost.org_id = o.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON ost.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bal'

changeSet.comment: Link BAL sample type to TB Laboratory organization
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_sample_type (id, org_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.organization_sample_type_seq'), o.id, tos.id, 'Y', 2, now() FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'bal';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'pleural fluid'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type ost JOIN clinlims.organization o ON ost.org_id = o.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON ost.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pleural fluid'

changeSet.comment: Link Pleural Fluid sample type to TB Laboratory organization
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_sample_type (id, org_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.organization_sample_type_seq'), o.id, tos.id, 'Y', 3, now() FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'pleural fluid';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'csf'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type ost JOIN clinlims.organization o ON ost.org_id = o.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON ost.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'csf'

changeSet.comment: Link CSF sample type to TB Laboratory organization
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_sample_type (id, org_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.organization_sample_type_seq'), o.id, tos.id, 'Y', 4, now() FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'csf';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'tissue'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type ost JOIN clinlims.organization o ON ost.org_id = o.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON ost.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue'

changeSet.comment: Link Tissue sample type to TB Laboratory organization
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_sample_type (id, org_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.organization_sample_type_seq'), o.id, tos.id, 'Y', 5, now() FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'tissue';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'gastric aspirate'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_sample_type ost JOIN clinlims.organization o ON ost.org_id = o.id JOIN clinlims.type_of_sample tos ON ost.sample_type_id = tos.id WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'gastric aspirate'

changeSet.comment: Link Gastric Aspirate sample type to TB Laboratory organization
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_sample_type (id, org_id, sample_type_id, is_active, sort_order, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.organization_sample_type_seq'), o.id, tos.id, 'Y', 6, now() FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.type_of_sample tos WHERE o.name = 'TB Laboratory' AND LOWER(tos.description) = 'gastric aspirate';

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_organizations no JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON no.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.organization o ON no.organization_id = o.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND o.name = 'TB Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Link TB Laboratory organization to Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook template
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_organizations (notebook_id, organization_id) SELECT n.id, o.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.organization o WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND o.name = 'TB Laboratory';

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'TB Laboratory' AND description = 'test section name'

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Create TB Laboratory department (test_section) for notebook dropdown

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'TB Laboratory' AND description = 'test section name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'TB Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'TB Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Link TB Laboratory department to Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook template
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'TB Laboratory';
